news.t: TCW Flexible Income ETF (FLXR) Crosses $2 Billion in Assets
TCW Names Scott Dennis Head of ETFs
TCW Fixed Income ETF Platform Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
TCW Completes Conversion of Flexible Income Mutual Fund to ETF

overview.description: The TCW Flexible Income ETF (FLXR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks to provide consistent income. The fund has the flexibility to invest across a wide spectrum of security type, credit quality and maturity profiles FLXR was launched on Nov 30, 2018 and is issued by TCW.

data.title: TCW Flexible Income ETF (FLXR) Crosses $2 Billion in Assets
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TCW Group, a leading global investment firm, announced today that the TCW Flexible Income ETF (FLXR) has surpassed $2 billion in assets under management (AUM), nearly...

data.title: TCW's Jennifer Grancio: Huge acceleration happening in ETFs
data.text: Jennifer Grancio, TCW global head of ETFs, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss ETF activity, market competition, and much more.

data.title: TCW Names Scott Dennis Head of ETFs
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TCW Group, a leading global asset manager, today announced that it has named Scott Dennis as the firm's Head of Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs).

data.title: TCW Completes Conversion of Flexible Income Mutual Fund to ETF
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TCW Group announced today that it has completed the conversion of TCW's MetWest Flexible Income Fund into an ETF: the TCW Flexible Income ETF.
